name: Cool Veggie Pizza
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (8 oz each) cream cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Spread the dough on a 13-inch baking stone and pinch seams together.
3. Bake 10-12 minutes until lightly browned, then remove from oven and let cool completely.
4. Blend cream cheese, mayonnaise, dill weed, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
5. Spread the cheese mixture over the cooled crust.
6. Topping: all finely chopped:
- zucchini
- green onions
- mushrooms
- seeded tomatoes
- green peppers
- seeded cucumbers
7. Sprinkle each layer of vegetables over the cheese mixture.
8. Refrigerate before serving.
